sql.query: SELECT taskName,status,priority,defaultOwnerType,defaultOwnerId FROM tbl_template_tasks WHERE id=:id AND templateId=:templateId AND tenantId=:tenantId LIMIT 1

UPDATE tbl_template_tasks t SET t.taskName=:taskName,t.description=:description,t.sortOrder=:sortOrder,t.priority=:priority,t.status=:status,t.isRequired=:isRequired,t.dueOffsetType=NULLIF(:dueOffsetType,''),t.dueOffsetDays=:dueOffsetDays,t.dueRelation=NULLIF(:dueRelation,''),t.defaultOwnerType=CASE WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM tbl_teams tm WHERE tm.id=:teamId1 AND tm.tenantId=t.tenantId AND tm.isActive=1) THEN 'team' ELSE 'unassigned' END,t.defaultOwnerId=CASE WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM tbl_teams tm WHERE tm.id=:teamId2 AND tm.tenantId=t.tenantId AND tm.isActive=1) THEN :teamId3 ELSE NULL END,t.modifiedDate=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE t.id=:id AND t.templateId=:templateId AND t.templateStageId=:stageId AND t.tenantId=:tenantId

INSERT INTO tbl_activity_log (tenantId,userId,entityType,entityId,actionType,summary,beforeJson,afterJson,createdDate) SELECT :tenantId,:userId,'template_task',:taskId,'template.updated',CONCAT(:actor,' updated template task ',:taskName),JSON_OBJECT('taskName',:oldName,'status',:oldStatus,'priority',:oldPriority,'teamId',:oldTeam),JSON_OBJECT('taskName',:newName,'status',:newStatus,'priority',:newPriority,'teamId',:newTeam),CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM tbl_activity_types at WHERE at.tenantId=:tenantId2 AND at.activityKey='template.updated' AND at.isActive=1 LIMIT 1
